✦ Open Source Music Player ✦

Listen
Without
Limits.

SuvMusic is a free, open-source music player crafted with love by **Suvojeet Sengupta**. This website was originally designed by **Tanmay Mondal** and is now maintained by Suvojeet.

Actively maintained · Open Source

Music Access
Features
🎵

Unlimited Playback

Stream any track without interruption. No ads, no skip limits, no subscription walls.

Free
🎨

Beautiful UI

Thoughtfully designed with a focus on visual clarity and smooth, delightful animations.

Polished
🔊

High-Quality Audio

Premium quality streaming with rich music metadata powered by open music APIs.

HQ Audio
📱

Android Only

Exclusively built for the Android ecosystem. Supports phones, Tablets, and Android TV.

Android Ecosystem
🔍

Smart Search

Find any song, artist, or album in seconds with intelligent search capabilities.

Instant
🌍

Open Source

Fully open — inspect the code, contribute features, or fork it for yourself on GitHub.

GPL-3.0 License
Experience

A player that feels alive.

Every interaction in SuvMusic is crafted to feel smooth and intentional — from the fluid animations to the elegant player controls.

  • Real-time waveform visualisation
  • Lyrics sync support
  • Gesture-based controls on mobile
  • Dark, immersive interface by design
  • Offline mode coming soon
